findings.description: The label "**重要**" is added to the note about using EXPECTED_COMPLETE_TABLE, but the source does not mark this statement as particularly important. The source presents it as a plain instruction without emphasis.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "期待値を記述する際、`EXPECTED_TABLE`の代わりに`EXPECTED_COMPLETE_TABLE`を使用する。" — no emphasis or importance marker present.

findings.description: The parenthetical "（主キー突合による順序無視ができない）" is added as an explanation to the assertSqlResultSetEquals bullet about primary keys. This specific phrase does not appear in the source; the source only states the reason without this interpretive gloss.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "SELECTで指定されたカラムに主キーが含まれているとは限らない為。" — no parenthetical explanation present.
